summary: Iteration 208 - All requested features verified. Backend: 400 key tests pass including translate parallel recovery (3 tests), ai_usage_tracker (31 tests), framework tests (385 tests), and new iteration_208 feature tests (16 tests). Frontend: Code review confirms PayID section at top of AdminDashboard, AiCostBadge component with correct data-testid, ReportTranslator with maxAttempts=300 and pollInterval=5000.
critical_code_review_comments: TRANSLATE CONCURRENCY: _run_translation_background uses asyncio.Semaphore(3) for 3-way parallel chunk translation - verified in test_chunks_run_concurrently (6 chunks complete in <0.9s)
TRANSLATE RECOVERY: _persist_task writes to translation_tasks collection; translate_status endpoint falls back to Mongo when in-memory state lost, returns recovered:true flag
TRANSLATE POLLING: ReportTranslator.jsx has maxAttempts=300, pollInterval=5000 (25 min ceiling) - verified via grep
ADMIN DASHBOARD: PayID section (data-testid='pending-payments-section') appears at line 171, before Live Visitor Statistics at line 263 - correct order
AI COST ENDPOINT: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/ai-cost returns totals, by_report_type breakdown - owner-only (404 for non-owners)
AI COST BADGE: AiCostBadge.jsx renders null when calls=0 (intentional silent behavior for cases with no AI usage)
COST TRACKER REGEX: _extract_case_id and _extract_report_type support case_<12hex> format (e.g. case_ec9b7141be1b) - 5 parametrized tests pass

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review verified all data-testid attributes and settings)
